popularStory.headline: History of John FitzGeoffrey (1207-1258)
popularStory.description:
John FitzGeoffrey, Lord of Shere and Justiciar of Ireland (1205? in Shere, Surrey, England – 23 November 1258) was an English nobleman.

John Fitz Geoffrey was the son of Geoffrey Fitz Peter, 1st Earl …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John FitzGeoffrey Lord of Shere and Justiciar of Ireland於1208年11月23日出生在英國英格蘭素瑞黑時，他的父親Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex46歲，母親Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex48歲。他於1234年4月12日與Isabel le Bigod在英國英格蘭素瑞黑結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和10個女兒的父母。他於1245年在愛爾蘭被列為justiciar of ireland。他去世於1258年11月23日在英國諾福爾可享年50歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可守爾達哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John FitzGeoffrey Lord of Shere and Justiciar of Ireland于1208年11月23日出生在英国英格兰素瑞黑时，他的父亲Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex46岁，母亲Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex48岁。他于1234年4月12日与Isabel le Bigod在英国英格兰素瑞黑结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和10个女儿的父母。他于1245年在爱尔兰被列为justiciar of ireland。他去世于1258年11月23日在英国諾福爾可享年50岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可守爾達哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When John FitzGeoffrey Lord of Shere and Justiciar of Ireland was born on 23 November 1208, in Shere, Surrey, England, United Kingdom, his father, Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex, was 46 and his mother, Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex, was 48. He married Isabel le Bigod on 12 April 1234, in Shere, Surrey, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 10 daughters. In 1245, his occupation is listed as justiciar of ireland in Ireland. He died on 23 November 1258, in Norfolk, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Shouldham, Norfolk, England.

fr.of Tonbridge Castle, Tonbridge, Kent, En: Tonbridge Castle, Tonbridge, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John FitzGeoffrey Lord of Shere and Justiciar of Ireland est né le 23 novembre 1208, à Shere, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex, avait 48 ans. Il a épousé Isabel le Bigod le 12 avril 1234, à Shere, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 10 filles. En 1245, sa profession de son indiquée est justiciar of ireland à Irlande. Il est décédé le 23 novembre 1258, à Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Shouldham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John FitzGeoffrey Lord of Shere and Justiciar of Ireland am 23. November 1208 in Shere, Surrey, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex 46 und seine Mutter Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex 48. Er hat am 12. April 1234 in Shere, Surrey, England, United Kingdom Isabel le Bigod geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 10 Töchter. 1245 ist sein Beruf als justiciar of ireland in Irland aufgeführt. Er starb am 23. November 1258 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Norfolk, England und wurde in Shouldham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John FitzGeoffrey Lord of Shere and Justiciar of Ireland è nato il il 23 novembre 1208 nel Shere, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex, aveva 48 anni. Lui sposato Isabel le Bigod il 12 aprile 1234, nel Shere, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 10 figlie. Nel 1245, la sua occupazione è indicata come justiciar of ireland nel Irlanda. Morì il 23 novembre 1258, nel Norfolk, England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Shouldham, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John FitzGeoffrey Lord of Shere and Justiciar of Irelandが1208年11月23日にイギリスイギリススリーシェアで生まれた時，父Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essexは46歳，母Aveline de Clare Countess of Essexは48歳であった。1234年4月12日にイギリスイギリススリーシェアでIsabel le Bigodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と10人の娘の親であった。1245年，アイルランドでの職業はjusticiar of irelandと記録されている。彼は1258年11月23日にイギリスノーフォルクで50歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクショウルドハムにて埋葬された。

ko.of Tonbridge Castle, Tonbridge, Kent, En: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 토브리지 토브리지 카스틀
ko.lifeSummary: John FitzGeoffrey Lord of Shere and Justiciar of Ireland(이)가 1208년 11월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 수리 셔에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex(은)는 48세였다. 그는 1234년 4월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 수리 셔에서 Isabel le Bigod(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 1245년, 그의 직업은 아일랜드에서 justiciar of ireland이었다. 그는 1258년 11월 23일 영국 노르폴크에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 쇼우드함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John FitzGeoffrey Lord of Shere and Justiciar of Ireland nasceu em 23 de novembro de 1208, em Shere, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex, tinha 48 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel le Bigod em 12 de abril de 1234, em Shere, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 10 filhas. Em 1245, sua profissão aparece como justiciar of ireland em Irlanda. Ele faleceu em 23 de novembro de 1258, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Shouldham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.of Tonbridge Castle, Tonbridge, Kent, En: тонбридж кастл, тонбридж, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John FitzGeoffrey Lord of Shere and Justiciar of Ireland родился 23 ноября 1208 г. в местности шир, сурри, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex, 48. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel le Bigod 12 апреля 1234 г. в местности шир, сурри, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 10 дочерей. В 1245 году он работал по профессии justiciar of ireland в местности Ирландия. Он умер 23 ноября 1258 г. в местности норфолк, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности шоулдхам, норфолк, Англия.

es.Saffron Walden, Essex, England, United K: Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John FitzGeoffrey Lord of Shere and Justiciar of Ireland nació el 23 de noviembre de 1208, en Shere, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex, tenía 48 años. Se casó con Isabel le Bigod el 12 de abril de 1234, en Shere, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 10 hijas. En 1245, su ocupación registrada era justiciar of ireland en Irlanda. Murió el 23 de noviembre de 1258, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Shouldham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
